paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.32, with a change of -4.03% compared to the prior close and -27.33% over the last 22 trading sessions. The price is as of July 23, 2026.

Recent news includes the announcement of the arrival of Siemens turbines at the Port of Houston, marking a milestone in the development of Fermi's Project Matador, and the announcement of the second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date. The earnings call is scheduled for August 13, 2026.

There have been recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K filing regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has also been one Form 4 filing. Additionally, there have been 3 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread about Fermi America.
